'''''Vendor''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Modular conveyor]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was part of convoy [[Rope 17]] which was supposed to upgrade the [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[ZA-13]]. ''Vendor'' carried equipment for the factory. Despite being attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiders, ''Vendor'' managed to deliver its cargo and escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
